title: How Does Cloud Computing Enable Scalability for Large Teams?

posts.author: harrycmary (Harry)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi everyone,

I’ve been diving into cloud computing lately and I’m curious to hear your thoughts on how it enables scalability, especially for large teams. More specifically, what are the key ways in which cloud services like AWS, Azure, or Google Cloud help businesses scale their operations, collaboration, and infrastructure?

From what I understand, cloud computing allows businesses to quickly adjust their computing resources based on demand, but I’m wondering how this translates into real-world applications. Do you think it’s mostly about flexibility in storage and compute power, or are there other areas where cloud computing really shines for large teams?

Looking forward to your insights!
